label: 00 - CORE
info: CORE = ingress + normalization + routing. No scheduling.

label: 20 - Posture Engine
info:
Security posture engine. Computed by default; manual by exception.
State listeners + debug.

label: 30 - Routines
info:
Night routine in Node-RED:
- Triggered by input_button.night_routine
- Soft security gate (warn-only by default)
- Fade down ONLY lights currently ON in light.main_floor
- Wait 25s
- Turn OFF light.main_floor
- Optional: turn ON a nightlight group
- Optional: set quiet hours

name: Vacation HARD OFF (ON only) (1)
info:
Turns OFF target lights ONLY when vacation_mode is ON.
Inputs:
- msg.target_entity (optional) default: light.main_floor

name: Vacation Presence Simulation (ON only)
info:
Runs ONLY when input_boolean.vacation_mode is ON.

Behavior:
- Each trigger has a probability of simulating occupancy (default 60%).
- If it runs: turn ON target lights at random brightness, hold for random minutes, then turn OFF.

Inputs:
- msg.target_entity (optional) default: light.main_floor
- msg.run_probability (optional) default: 0.60
- msg.min_brightness (optional) default: 20
- msg.max_brightness (optional) default: 70
- msg.min_minutes_on (optional) default: 8
- msg.max_minutes_on (optional) default: 40

Outputs:
- 1) finished simulation (or skipped)

name: Vacation HARD OFF (ON only)
info:
Turns OFF target lights ONLY when vacation_mode is ON.
Inputs:
- msg.target_entity (optional) default: light.main_floor

name: Gate – Vacation Mode
info:
Blocks scheduled actions when input_boolean.vacation_mode is ON.
Optionally allows specific actions if msg.vacation_bypass === true.

Outputs:
1) PASS
2) BLOCKED (optional notify)

name: JARVIS.DoorLogic.ModeRouter
info:
Input: any msg from a door-open trigger.
Expected env vars:
- DOOR_NAME
- MODE_ENTITY
- ALARM_BOOL
- ALARM_REASON_TEXT
- TTS_ENTITY
- MEDIA_PLAYER
- ANNOUNCE_MODES
- NIGHT_MODE_VALUE

name: AI - OpenAI Request
info:
Reusable OpenAI Responses API request subflow.
Input:
- msg.payload: prompt string
- msg.model: optional model override (default gpt-5-mini)
- msg.system: optional system prompt
Outputs:
1) success -> msg.payload = response text
2) error   -> msg.payload = error text

name: Door Manager Processor v2.1
info: Input: normalized door event msg.payload = {door, entity_id, state, open, ts, when}. Outputs: 1) security alerts 2) left-open alerts 3) after-dark entry events

name: Door Manager v3.2
info: Reusable door manager. Input is a normalized door event in msg.payload = {door, entity_id, state, open, ts, when}. Outputs: 1 left-open + suppressed-left-opens, 2 after-dark events.
